scripts.build:deps: pnpm --filter @pi-gui/session-driver build && pnpm --filter @pi-gui/catalogs build && pnpm --filter @pi-gui/pi-sdk-driver build
scripts.dev:electron:watch: tsup electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --format cjs --platform node --target node22 --out-dir dist-electron --external electron --watch
scripts.dev:electron:start: wait-on dist-electron/main.js dist-electron/preload.js http://localhost:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.build: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run build:renderer && pnpm run build:electron
scripts.build:electron: tsup electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts --format cjs --platform node --target node22 --out-dir dist-electron --external electron
scripts.test:e2e:all: pnpm run test:e2e:core && pnpm run test:e2e:live && pnpm run test:e2e:native
scripts.test:e2e:core: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/core
scripts.test:e2e:native: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=foreground pnpm exec playwright test tests/native
scripts.test:e2e:live: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/live
scripts.test:core:navigation: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/core/navigation.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:archive: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/core/archive.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:composer-controls: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/core/composer-controls.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:mentions-diff: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/core/mentions-diff.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:persistence: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/core/persistence.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:skills-settings: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/core/skills-settings.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:workspace-menu: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/core/workspace-menu.spec.ts
scripts.test:core:worktrees: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/core/worktrees.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:parallel: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/live/parallel-runs.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:notifications: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/live/notifications.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:tool-calls: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/live/tool-calls.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:extension-dock: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/live/extension-dock.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:extension-dock-reload: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/live/extension-dock-reload.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:extension-command-compatibilit: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/live/extension-command-compatibility.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:extensions: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/live/extensions.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:extensions-dialogs: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/live/extensions-dialogs.spec.ts
scripts.test:live:extensions-session-isolation: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=background pnpm exec playwright test tests/live/extensions-session-isolation.spec.ts
scripts.test:native:open-folder: pnpm build && cross-env PI_APP_TEST_MODE=foreground pnpm exec playwright test tests/native/open-folder.spec.ts
